**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level 'high-altitude 10-million-level major plant' illusion pulverization and the '1-personnel high-altitude 22k RMB shell communication proxy' physical demotion probe. The illusory Apple hardware OEM template in the original data has been physically completely written off. This enterprise, named 'Linghai Electronic Technology,' has a registered capital as high as a staggering 11 million. Its business license is extremely lengthy, piling up exceedingly hardcore communication and semiconductor terms such as 'mobile communication antennas, digital optical fiber systems (MDAS), communication batteries, optical fiber cables, chips, microwave communication equipment.' In the official's mentally retarded algorithm, it is naturally enshrined on the altar of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly deployed the most devastating digital nuclear bomb of the entire batch: this 'major communication chip and optical cable plant' with a 10-million registered capital has an actual paid-in capital of only 22,000 RMB (twenty-two thousand yuan), not even enough to buy a spool of high-end optical cable! And the entire company's insured headcount is only 1 person! The physical spatial probe delivered the final blow: 'Room 1216, Building 8, Fortune Plaza Phase II.' The logical deduction instantly turned into dark humor about bidding: in a high-altitude single room on the 12th floor of a commercial plaza, the boss became the sole 'bare commander,' clutching just over 20,000 RMB, claiming to have built a 'chip manufacturing, optical fiber drawing, and communication base station antenna super factory' that requires tens of billions in investment and huge factory buildings? The probe mercilessly deleted all the hallucinations in the license, extracting the actual work done with twenty thousand RMB: 'sales of various communication equipment, optical cables, security, and weak current equipment (pure reseller); comprehensive cabling and network engineering construction (contractor taking orders).' The truth is starkly naked and strongly features characteristics of the engineering circle: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee High-Rise Weak Current Broker & Cabling Contractor (a 10-million-level shell). The boss is highly likely a middleman running mobile, telecom engineering, or security projects. Inflating the registered capital to 11 million is purely to cross the bidding threshold for large-scale weak current or communication projects. After winning a bid, they buy ready-made optical cables and surveillance cameras, and hire casual laborers for 'comprehensive cabling.' The official 'Electronic Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most outrageous system-level indulgence of this 'something for nothing' high-altitude engineering proxy.
